home.heroTitle: Smart lunch for the team, delivered fast & fresh.
home.heroBody: 30+ dishes per week, suitable for all diets. Order via app and strengthen team spirit with a tax-free meal subsidy.
home.trustedBody: More presence and less admin with automated lunching.
home.featuresTitle: Lunch for teams that grow fast
home.feature1Body: Individual selection, allergens & halal labels included.
home.feature2Body: Freshly cooked, delivered same-day, scalable anytime.
home.feature3Body: Tax-compliant, one monthly invoice, full budget control.
home.stepsTitle: From a test lunch to a daily ritual
home.step2: Team orders in the app by 9:00.
home.solution2Body: You choose the days, we deliver.
home.ctaTitle: Fresh lunch for everyone — cheaper thanks to meal subsidy
home.ctaBody: Book a free test lunch for up to 50 people.
